intent_precise: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute primers to 384 well plates: Using one_ml_plate (plate, slot 8). (1) Transfer from source to column A1.
intent: For the PCR/qPCR primer distribution protocol, you'll need to work with the one_ml_plate that's positioned in slot 8. Take your primer source and transfer the contents to column A1 of the 384-well plate. This is the first step in setting up the primer distribution across the entire plate for your PCR reactions.

output_schema.protocol_name: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute primers to 384 well plates
output_schema.author: Steve Plonk <protocols@opentrons.com>
